articles.author: Raha Pourbakhsh
articles.title: Iran pressuring women footballers who defected in Australia to return - ایران اینترنشنال
articles.description: A member of Iran’s women’s national football team staff who sought asylum in Australia along with several of her players is trying to persuade the others not to follow suit but instead return to Iran, informed sources told Iran International.
articles.content: Hundreds of people have been detained across the country over the past two weeks, according to information reviewed by Iran International and local reports. Many detainees identities, locations of de… [+5403 chars]
